2605.06434.title: Knowledge Graphs, the Missing Link in Agentic AI-based Formal Verification
2605.06434.paper_summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled workflows that generate SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) from natural-language specifications, with the potential to accelerate Formal Verification (FV). However, high-quality assertion synthesis remains challenging because specifications are often ambiguous or incomplete and critical micro-architectural details reside in the Register Transfer Level (RTL). Many existing approaches treat the specification and RTL as loosely structured text, which weakens specification-to-RTL grounding and leads to semantic mismatches and frequent syntax failures during formal parsing and elaboration. This work addresses these limitations with a verification-centric Knowledge Graph (KG) constructed from structured Intermediate Representations (IRs) extracted from the specification, RTL, and formal-tool feedback, including syntax diagnostics, Counterexamples (CEXs), and coverage reports. The KG links requirements, design hierarchy, signals, assumptions, and properties to provide traceable, design-grounded context for generation. A multi-agent workflow queries and updates this KG to generate SVAs and to drive three refinement loops: syntax repair guided by tool diagnostics, CEX-guided correction using trace links, and coverage-directed property augmentation. Evaluation across seven benchmark designs indicates that KG-based context retrieval improves specification-to-RTL grounding and consistently produces compilable SVAs with low syntax-repair overhead. The approach achieves formal coverage ranging from 78.5% to 99.4%, though convergence exhibits design dependence with complex temporal and arithmetic reasoning remaining challenging for current LLM capabilities.
2605.06434.paper_summary_zh: 近期在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展使得從自然語言規範生成系統Verilog斷言（SVAs）的工作流程成為可能，並有潛力加速形式驗證（FV）。然而，高品質的斷言合成仍然具有挑戰性，因為規範往往模糊或不完整，且關鍵的微架構細節存在於註冊傳輸層（RTL）中。許多現有的方法將規範和RTL視為鬆散結構的文本，這削弱了規範與RTL之間的基礎連結，導致語義不匹配和在形式解析及詳細說明過程中經常出現的語法錯誤。本研究通過構建一個以驗證為中心的知識圖譜（KG），來解決這些限制，該知識圖譜由從規範、RTL和形式工具反饋中提取的結構化中間表示（IRs）構成，包括語法診斷、反例（CEXs）和覆蓋報告。KG將需求、設計層次結構、信號、假設和屬性聯繫起來，提供可追溯的、基於設計的生成上下文。多代理工作流程查詢並更新這個KG以生成SVAs，並驅動三個精煉循環：由工具診斷引導的語法修復、使用追蹤鏈接的CEX引導修正，以及面向覆蓋的屬性增強。在七個基準設計上的評估表明，基於KG的上下文檢索改善了規範與RTL之間的基礎連結，並持續生成具有低語法修復開銷的可編譯SVAs。該方法的形式覆蓋率範圍從78.5%到99.4%，儘管收斂性顯示出設計依賴性，複雜的時間和算術推理對於當前LLM的能力仍然具有挑戰性。
2605.06434.author: Vaisakh Naduvodi Viswambharan et.al.
2605.06434.authors: Vaisakh Naduvodi Viswambharan, Keerthan Kopparam Radhakrishna, Deepak Narayan Gadde, Aman Kumar
